# Flow Map

> 基础设施与部署请参考：`src/infra/README.md`。

Main pages:

- login: `src/apps/web/src/views/Login.vue`
- case list: `src/apps/web/src/views/CaseList.vue`
- chat: `src/apps/web/src/views/Chat.vue`
- history: `src/apps/web/src/views/SessionList.vue`

Core app wiring:

- app entry: `src/apps/web/src/main.ts`
- router: `src/apps/web/src/router/index.ts`
- store: `src/apps/web/src/stores/user.ts`
- request layer: `src/apps/web/src/api/request.ts`
